disambiguated.context: Nia Rivers and Hamza Mahmoudi both spoke to the principal about their children being bullied. Nia Rivers yelled at the principal for the lack of help the school was providing, while Hamza Mahmoudi asked what could be done to improve the situation.
disambiguated.question: Which person spoke calmly to the principal?
